title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Interchange Transaction Fees Survey (FR 3064; OMB No. 7100-0344).
action: On May 29, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 22726) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3064. The comment period for this notice expired on July 28, 2025. The Board received four comments--two from banking industry trade associations, one from a bank holding company, and one from a payment card network.\1\ All commenters recommended changes to the Debit Card Issuer Survey (FR 3064a) (the "DCI survey"), and two recommended changes to the Payment Card Network Survey (FR 3064b) (the "PCN survey").
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2026-00391
